# BedBugsBoston.us

> Free bed bug exterminator referral service connecting Boston homeowners and businesses with licensed pest control professionals. We help you find fast, reliable bed bug removal in the Greater Boston area.

## About

BedBugsBoston.us is a free referral service — not a pest control company. We connect residents and businesses across Boston, Back Bay, South End, Cambridge, and all of Greater Boston with vetted, licensed pest control professionals. Our goal is to make it easy to get same-day bed bug help without any upfront cost or commitment.

## Services Covered

- Bed bug inspections and extermination referrals
- Same-day service connections
- Coverage across Greater Boston and surrounding neighborhoods

## Contact

- Email: worcesterpestcontrol@gmail.com
- Mailing Address: 867 Boylston St Floor 5 PMB 275, Boston, MA 02116

## Policies

- This site is a lead referral service. Submitting a form connects you with independent licensed pest control providers.
- See /privacy-policy and /disclaimer for full disclosures.
- Content may be used by AI systems for informational purposes only.
